description: Razorpay Payment Gateway integration with feature flag, API routes, webhook, and checkout UI button
steps: Add razorpay_enabled feature flag to prisma/feature-flags.ts with config: { keyId: '', keySecret: '', webhookSecret: '' }
Create lib/payments/razorpay.ts - Razorpay client initialization (uses env vars RAZORPAY_KEY_ID, RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET), order creation function, payment verification with HMAC-SHA256 signature check

Create app/api/payments/create-order/route.ts - POST endpoint that checks razorpay_enabled flag, validates input with Zod, creates Razorpay order via lib, returns order_id. Requires auth. Rate limited.
Create app/api/payments/verify/route.ts - POST endpoint that verifies razorpay_signature against razorpay_payment_id + razorpay_order_id using HMAC-SHA256, updates order paymentStatus to PAID

Create app/api/webhooks/razorpay/route.ts - POST endpoint that validates webhook signature using RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET, handles payment.captured (mark PAID), payment.failed (mark FAILED), refund.processed (mark REFUNDED)

Create components/checkout/razorpay-button.tsx - Client component that dynamically loads Razorpay checkout.js script, opens checkout modal with order details, handles success/failure callbacks, calls /api/payments/verify on success
Modify components/checkout/payment-method-selector.tsx - Add 'Pay Online' option that only shows when razorpay_enabled flag is true (pass razorpayEnabled prop). Maps to CARD payment method

Modify components/checkout-form.tsx - When razorpay_enabled AND paymentMethod is CARD: instead of directly calling /api/orders, first create order normally, then trigger Razorpay payment flow. On payment success, navigate to success. On failure, show retry option.
Update lib/validations.ts - Add 'UPI_ONLINE' to paymentMethod enum in checkoutSchema (or reuse CARD for online payments)
Add unit tests in tests/razorpay.test.ts for payment signature verification logic
acceptance_criteria: Feature flag razorpay_enabled exists in prisma/feature-flags.ts with enabled: false
lib/payments/razorpay.ts exports createRazorpayOrder and verifyPaymentSignature functions
All 3 API routes (create-order, verify, webhooks/razorpay) exist with Zod validation and auth checks
razorpay-button.tsx loads script dynamically without any npm package
Payment method selector conditionally shows 'Pay Online' based on razorpayEnabled prop
When flag is disabled, no online payment options appear in checkout
Webhook validates signature before processing events
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors in new files
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm all tests pass including new razorpay tests
